---
title: ID.me Federated Citizen-Identity Service — Adapter Validation Suite
doc-type: avs
adapter-id: id-me-federation-service
adapter-class: modernization
mission-class: integration
status: reserved
phase: phase-planning
gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate
canon-source: src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml
derived-from: uiao/canon (sync_canon.py)
generated: '2026-05-07'
---

# ID.me Federated Citizen-Identity Service — Adapter Validation Suite

::: {.callout-note}
## Canon-derived document

**Status:** `reserved` · **Class:** `modernization` · **Mission:** `integration` · **Phase:** `phase-planning`

**Canon source:** `canon/modernization-registry.yaml` (propagated by `uiao/tools/sync_canon.py`).

The YAML frontmatter and this banner are regenerated from canon on every sync. **Do not hand-edit.** Author new material only below the `## Overview` heading.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold — awaiting authored content

This document is a stub. Replace every `_TODO — ..._` block with authored content that is consistent with UIAO canon. Canon invariants (`gcc-boundary`, `ssot-mutation: never`, etc.) must never be contradicted.
:::

## Overview

_TODO — Author an overview of the ID.me Federated Citizen-Identity Service adapter's role in the UIAO governance perimeter. Do not contradict canon. Cross-reference the companion ATS document where relevant._

## Scope

Target surfaces / subsystems: `saml-assertion-issuance`, `oidc-issuance`, `ial-2-proofing`, `ial-3-step-up`, `aal-2-authentication`

_TODO — Expand scope with concrete boundaries: what the adapter reads, what it emits, what it explicitly does not touch._

## Controls

NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls this adapter supports: `IA-2`, `IA-2(1)`, `IA-2(2)`, `IA-4`, `IA-8`, `AU-2`, `AU-12`, `SC-8`, `SC-13`

_TODO — For each control, state the adapter's role (primary, supporting, evidence-only). If a control is aspirational, flag as `NEW (Proposed)` per No-Hallucination Protocol._

## Operational profile

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Runtime | `python-3.12` |
| Runtime pin | `TBD` |
| Runner class | `github-hosted` |
| Tenancy | `per-customer` |
| Evidence class | `baseline` |
| Retention | `7` year(s) |

## Canon invariants

- `gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate`
- `ssot-mutation: never`
- `certificate-anchored: true`
- `object-identity-only: true`

## Notes from canon

ID.me is a commercial federal-authorized IdP serving multiple federal customer-facing portals (VA, IRS, SSA, etc.). Issues SAML 2.0 assertions (per ADR-051) and OIDC tokens at IAL-2 / AAL-2 with IAL-3 step-up available. Procurement and federal authorization are agency-specific; commercial-license considerations apply unlike the public-domain Login.gov. Activation requires a per-adapter ADR modeled on ADR-035.

## References

- UIAO-CANON-003
- ADR-051
- ADR-055
- UIAO_141
- UIAO_142

---

*Generated by `uiao/tools/sync_canon.py`. See `uiao/ARCHITECTURE.md` §4 for the cross-repo sync contract. See `uiao-docs/_quarto.yml` for rendering configuration.*
